latest.title: Live Updates: Russia Hammers Ukraine’s Capital in Deadly Attacks
latest.summary: At least 21 people were killed in Kyiv, the local authorities said. Ukraine’s president had warned that Moscow was preparing a “massive strike” as…
latest.details: At least 21 people were killed in Kyiv, the local authorities said. Ukraine’s president had warned that Moscow was preparing a “massive strike” as his country’s forces have hit deeper into Russian territory.

latest.title: Tesla stock sinks 7% despite strong deliveries report
latest.summary: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.
latest.details: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.

latest.title: Good Morning, Earth!
latest.summary: NASA astronaut Chris Williams took this photo of an orbital sunrise from the International Space Station on June 26, 2026.
latest.details: Image Article A bright orange sunburst illuminates Earth’s atmosphere during an orbital sunrise in this photograph from the International Space Station as it orbited 264 miles above the Caucasus Mountains. NASA/Chris Williams NASA astronaut Chris Williams took this photo of an orbital sunrise from the International Space Station on June 26, 2026. In 24 hours, the space station makes 16 orbits of Earth, traveling through 16 sunrises and sunsets. NASA explores the unknown in air and space, innovates for the benefit of humanity, and inspires the world through discovery.

radar.title: Iran Prepares to Bury Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Killed at Iran War’s Outset
radar.summary: Long-delayed funeral ceremonies for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed during U.S.-Israeli strikes at the war’s outset, are set to begin Friday.
radar.details: Long-delayed funeral ceremonies for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed during U. -Israeli strikes at the war’s outset, are set to begin Friday. For the regime, it is a critical moment to demonstrate that it has endured.
